privileged_info_summary: The create_chart task is a medium-difficulty LibreOffice Calc task with a 300-second timeout and 40 maximum steps. It uses entirely synthetic sales data: 6 months (January through June) with hardcoded monthly sales values (12500, 15200, 14800, 16300, 17900, 18500). Success requires 75% score (3 out of 4 criteria): chart object exists in ODS file, chart type is bar or column, chart has data range configured pointing to sales data, and sales data is preserved (minimum 6 rows). The verifier awards partial credit (0.5 points) if a chart exists but is the wrong type. Output must be saved in ODS format. All task parameters and success criteria claims verified against actual source files (task.json, README.md, setup_task.sh, verifier.py).
